name: regime-routed-bsc-alpha
summary: Turns CoinMarketCap market, OHLCV, DEX-liquidity, token-security, trending, global and Fear & Greed data into a regime-routed long/stable rotation over 20 eligible BSC tokens. A market-regime classifier routes overall exposure; a multi-factor alpha blend (momentum + RSI + MACD + volume + volatility + liquidity + sentiment + execution-quality, minus a security penalty) ranks candidates; a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and stable reserve builds the target book.

name: funding-rate-carry-bsc
summary: Turns a synthetic per-hour perpetual-swap funding-rate proxy (24h-return slice plus a volatility-deviation term, clamped to [-1, 1]) into a long basis-carry tilt over 20 eligible BSC tokens. A market-regime classifier routes overall exposure; a funding tilt up-weights assets with favourable funding (negative or only mildly positive) and fades richly-positive, crowded longs; the tilt multiplies the base alpha score, the security penalty is re-applied as a haircut, and a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and stable reserve builds the target book.

name: mean-reversion-chop-bsc
summary: A mean-reversion / range-fade strategy specialised for the CHOP (range-bound) regime over 20 eligible BSC tokens. A reversion signal blends RSI(14, Wilder) and the Bollinger(20, 2-sigma) %B band position: oversold names (low RSI, price at/below the lower band) score highest as buy candidates while overbought names (high RSI, price at/above the upper band) are trimmed/avoided, and ATR(14) scales protective stops. The tilt multiplies the base alpha score, the security penalty is re-applied as a haircut, and a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and a large stable reserve builds the target book. The regime exposure multiplier is inverted relative to the momentum Skills: most active in chop (1.0), low in trending risk_on/breakout (0.4/0.2), minimal in risk_off (0.15).

name: trend-breakout-momentum-bsc
summary: A momentum / breakout strategy specialised for the BREAKOUT (strong, broad, well-bid advance) regime over 20 eligible BSC tokens. A breakout signal combines a rising EMA(12/26/50) stack, a positive MACD histogram, and a 20-bar Donchian high breakout confirmed by volume expansion (volume_ratio >= 1.5): breakout_tilt = 0.4*trend_score + 0.35*momentum_component + 0.25*struct_score, where an unconfirmed breakout (volume_ratio < 1.0) collapses struct_score to 0 (fakeout). The tilt multiplies the base alpha score, the security penalty is re-applied as a haircut, ATR(14) sets the trailing stop, and a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and a USDT reserve builds the target book. The regime exposure multiplier PEAKS in breakout (1.1) and is full in risk_on (1.0), cut in chop (0.4), minimal in risk_off (0.15) — the mirror image of mean-reversion-chop.

name: volatility-targeted-risk-parity-bsc
summary: A risk-based SIZING strategy on a new axis from the four signal-direction Skills: instead of deciding what to buy, it decides how much of each to hold. It sizes every eligible, liquid, security-clean, non-stable name by the INVERSE of its trailing realised volatility (weight ∝ 1/realised_vol) so each holding contributes roughly EQUAL RISK (risk parity / equal-risk contribution, mirroring crates/portfolio-optimizer::inverse_volatility / risk_parity_lite), then SCALES GROSS EXPOSURE to hit a 45% target portfolio volatility via target_vol_scalar = clamp(0.45 / est_book_vol, 0.20, 1.00) (never levered). It DE-RISKS in risk_off (rising realised vol shrinks gross toward the USDT reserve). A regime multiplier trims gross (breakout/risk_on 1.0, chop 0.8, risk_off 0.4); per name capped at 17%, USDT reserve remainder. Registered as an additional standalone strategy — the four-skill regime-complementary ensemble core (ensemble.json) is unchanged.

name: social-sentiment-momentum-bsc
summary: A social + sentiment momentum strategy over 20 eligible BSC tokens that reads the crowd rather than the chart: it asks whether ATTENTION is accelerating and whether that attention is CONFIRMED by money. The signal blends a trending-rank VELOCITY leg (a name climbing the CMC trending / most-visited board vs the prior cycle), a VOLUME SURGE leg (volume_ratio = volume_24h / avg_volume >= 1.5), and a SOCIAL ATTENTION leg (mentions/views momentum): attention_tilt = 0.4*trend_score + 0.35*volume_component + 0.25*social_component, where hype without volume (volume_ratio < 1.0) collapses volume_component to 0 (faded). A market-wide Fear & Greed sentiment gate haircuts the tilt by 0.6 at extremes (>= 80 blowoff-top, <= 20 capitulation). The tilt multiplies the base alpha score, the security penalty is re-applied as a haircut, and a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and a USDT reserve builds the target book. Exposure is full/peak in risk_on/breakout (1.0/1.1) and cut in chop (0.4) / risk_off (0.15).

name: momentum-volatility-blend-bsc
summary: Blends price momentum with a volatility-quality filter over 20 eligible BSC tokens: it favours names that are simultaneously strongly trending (positive risk-adjusted momentum, an aligned rising EMA12/26/50 stack, a positive MACD histogram) AND sitting in a healthy realised-volatility band, and demotes both DEAD-vol names (no trend energy, the move stalls) and BLOW-OFF-vol names (parabolic, exhaustion-prone). A momentum leg (momentum_leg = 0.5*trend_score + 0.5*momentum_score, forced to 0 in a downtrend or on a negative MACD histogram) is MULTIPLIED by a bell-shaped vol_quality gate over trailing realised volatility (1.0 in the healthy band ~50-80% annualised, ramping to 0 below the 40% floor and above the 110% ceiling): blend_tilt = momentum_leg * vol_quality. The tilt multiplies the base alpha score, the security penalty is re-applied as a haircut, ATR(14) sets the protective stop, and a score-proportional allocator with a per-name cap and a USDT reserve builds the target book. The regime exposure multiplier peaks in breakout (1.1), is full in risk_on (1.0), cut in chop (0.4), minimal in risk_off (0.15).
